description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:latest Docker image and defines a deploy stage with a job named hekoru. The hekoru job runs only on the master branch of the delt arena/hsgs-hackathon-18 project, executes "gem install dpl" then "dpl --provider=heroku --app=hsgs-hackathon-18 --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY" to deploy the app to Heroku, and is assigned to the deploy stage. No services, caches, or artifacts are defined.
